title: The last Youchew contributions...collab
description:
So this is it. Once upon a time which was 6 days before the closure of the forum, an idea popped in my head. I thought that while the countdown of the forum closure was running out, I could host a collab where would contribute anything they wanted in such short time frame. There was no rule, but some people thought of making their videos reference the forum (farewell and all that), so now it seems like the rule was to do farewell poops.

Anyway, FUCKING FINALLY this collab is out. I apologise for being lazy to commit some time to release the collab like 1-2 days after the forum had closed. The other problem was lots of technical problems, some due to using an 10 years old version of Sony Vegas, but I don't want to go into too much detail. And now it's uploaded. Great.

Participants in order:

Lazer Star (I thought I used his entry as an intro)
BananaMannafoot
DSYTP
Ian O'Keefe
MissingnoUploader
morshute
mrdoognoog
Olivia (formerly saper)
Pizz
Snes (calvin perry)
thapoint09
The3werto
ThornBrain
Usualignat
Snes (calvin perry)
Cornflakes (extra addition to the collab, didn't contribute)
...and of course, me!

Thanks for participating, and farewell to what was once the biggest spot of rejoicing audiovisual crap. It was once Youtube Poop, then Youchew Poop and lastly Youchew. We all munched pretty good, but it was time to do some sort of splitting. The demographic that is interested in making youtube poop, which are mostly 13-18 year olds, continue having fun on YTP Mania. Some oldtimers aka. veterans and people who are interested in creating art in general, make Neon Castle their new home. Some are on both, including me.

Thanks for the fun on Youchew and see ya on both forums. Here are the links:

YTP Mania: https://ytpmania.net/
Neon Castle: https://neoncastle.net/
